notes: u_sem_nm is provisionally anchored to EXP-SE-017 (0.1 um 3sigma SEM-vs-line-scale difference -> 100 nm).
u_ellip_nm is anchored to EXP-SE-013 (0.5 nm expanded uncertainty, k=2), with SRM-family transfer anchors EXP-SE-021..EXP-SE-031 recorded for certificate-linked updates.
